creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
(In reply to Bob Bishop from comment #1)

Thank you for the clue. It looks like blacklistd doesn't parse addresses enclosed in square braces at all. It won't complain about anything put in [], even literally: 

[x:y:z:0:0:0:0:0]/48:ssh        *       *       *      =       *       *
